narrative: IEA Chief Birol's warning of higher energy prices if the Strait of Hormuz is not reopened drives crude lower — WTI Oil down 3.83% — and supports the USD; EUR/USD at 1.1797, USD/JPY near 159.05, and AUD/USD at 0.7173. Gold higher +0.19% on safe-haven demand amid elevated VIX at 18.1. Equities steady, S&P 500 +0.26%, as the market weighs the impact of potential supply disruptions.
